name: 观点写作
subject: english
curriculum_points: 1. Use a combination of drawing, dictating, and writing to compose opinion pieces in which they tell a reader the topic or the name of the book they are writing about and state an opinion or preference about the topic or book (e.g., My favorite book is...).

interactive_resources.description: H5P 写作框架/对话练习
